title: [v4.9-rhel] Don't update health check status during initialDelaySeconds
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #20789

/assign umohnani8

```release-note
For kube play, the health check status will wait the full start period time before updating for a healthy state as it was already doing for an unhealthy state. This matches what k8s does with the InitialDelaySeconds.
```
